meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 dotted-letter composition (aozora annotation etc.html). The directive addresses a base Latin letter in the immediately-preceding run — no 「X」 quote — and composes a combining dot above it: the m of the reclaimed Sam becomes ṁ (NFC U+1E41). Reclaimed origin: §7.5 pulls the run back so the styled span is its sole rendered copy; §7.6 serialize re-emits the literal run then the raw directive body byte-exact. Offsets from the §4 byte model (fullwidth = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor.
